---
title: "sphere_grid_unpad_2d"
generated: true
description: "Strip the padding added by [`sphere_grid_pad_2d`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_pad_2d.qmd)."
---

[вЂ№ back to `nitrix.geometry.sphere_grid`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:sphere_grid_unpad_2d -->
```python
sphere_grid_unpad_2d(image: Num[Array, '... H_padded W_padded ...'], pad: PadSpec, *, height_axis: int = -2, width_axis: int = -1) -> Num[Array, '... H W ...']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:sphere_grid_unpad_2d -->
Strip the padding added by [`sphere_grid_pad_2d`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_pad_2d.qmd).

The inverse operation is a plain slice along the height and width
axes; it is provided as a companion so the composition pattern
reads cleanly:
    padded = sphere_grid_pad_2d(image, pad=k)
    out_padded = some_valid_padded_kernel(padded)
    out = sphere_grid_unpad_2d(out_padded, pad=k)
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:sphere_grid_unpad_2d -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `image` | `Num` | `...` Г— `H_padded` Г— `W_padded` Г— `...` | вЂ” | Padded image, `(..., H_padded, W_padded, ...)`, as produced by [`sphere_grid_pad_2d`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_pad_2d.qmd). |
| `pad` | `PadSpec` | вЂ” | вЂ” | Pad amount that was applied. `int` -> symmetric `h_pad = w_pad = pad`; `(h_pad, w_pad)` -> per-axis. Must match the value passed to [`sphere_grid_pad_2d`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_pad_2d.qmd). |
| `height_axis` | `int` | вЂ” | `-2` | Axis index of the latitudinal (height) axis. Default `-2`. Must match the value passed to [`sphere_grid_pad_2d`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_pad_2d.qmd). |
| `width_axis` | `int` | вЂ” | `-1` | Axis index of the longitudinal (width) axis. Default `-1`. Must match the value passed to [`sphere_grid_pad_2d`](../nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_pad_2d.qmd). |

**Returns** `Num` вЂ” shape `...` Г— `H` Г— `W` Г— `...`. The un-padded image, with `H = H_padded - 2 * h_pad` along `height_axis` and `W = W_padded - 2 * w_pad` along `width_axis`; all other axes unchanged.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:sphere_grid_unpad_2d -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks вЂ” nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **105.6 Вµs** (median, L4).  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_SPHERE_GRID_UNPAD_2D.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=128 | `cupy.sphere_grid_unpad_2d` | skipped | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=128 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 13.3 Вµs / 13.9 Вµs | 58.89 ms | 699 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=128 | `numpy.sphere_grid_unpad` | ok | 0.7 Вµs / 0.9 Вµs | 5.1 Вµs | 699 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.05x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=128 | `cupy.sphere_grid_unpad_2d` | ok | 3.4 Вµs / 3.9 Вµs | 27.1 Вµs | 0.13 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.04x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=128 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 89.6 Вµs / 105.6 Вµs | 108.64 ms | 0.37 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=128 | `numpy.sphere_grid_unpad` | ok | 0.6 Вµs / 0.7 Вµs | 5.0 Вµs | 0.13 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.01x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=256 | `cupy.sphere_grid_unpad_2d` | skipped | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 28.8 Вµs / 39.9 Вµs | 61.20 ms | 699 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=256 | `numpy.sphere_grid_unpad` | ok | 0.5 Вµs / 0.6 Вµs | 4.7 Вµs | 699 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.02x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=256 | `cupy.sphere_grid_unpad_2d` | ok | 3.4 Вµs / 3.7 Вµs | 29.1 Вµs | 0.52 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.04x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=256 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 95.3 Вµs / 99.5 Вµs | 102.76 ms | 1.52 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=256 | `numpy.sphere_grid_unpad` | ok | 0.5 Вµs / 0.6 Вµs | 3.8 Вµs | 0.52 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.01x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=64 | `cupy.sphere_grid_unpad_2d` | skipped | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” | вЂ” |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 8.9 Вµs / 9.3 Вµs | 49.11 ms | 699 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cpu | h=64 | `numpy.sphere_grid_unpad` | ok | 0.4 Вµs / 0.5 Вµs | 4.5 Вµs | 699 MB (rss) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.05x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=64 | `cupy.sphere_grid_unpad_2d` | ok | 3.3 Вµs / 3.8 Вµs | 26.4 Вµs | 0.03 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.03x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 95.3 Вµs / 117.8 Вµs | 99.92 ms | 0.09 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| sphere_grid_unpad_2d | jax-cuda12 | h=64 | `numpy.sphere_grid_unpad` | ok | 0.4 Вµs / 0.5 Вµs | 5.1 Вµs | 0.03 MB (hbm) | вњ“ 0Г—tol | 0.00x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `da5314ba` В· nitrix `f42e7ff8`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:sphere_grid_unpad_2d -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `H_padded` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `W_padded` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `H` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `W` | *(undocumented вЂ” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
